title: Cover of vaccination evaluated rapidly (COVER) programme: quality and methodology information
body: "The Cover of Vaccination Evaluated Rapidly (COVER) programme evaluates childhood immunisation in England, collating data for children aged 1, 2 and 5. This quality and methodology information applies to quarterly and annual reports from quarter 4 of financial year 2024 to 2025.  For any enquiries or feedback, please contact cover@ukhsa.gov.uk  "
